title: Ranwid the Elder
description:
You are approached by the [purple]oldest person you have ever seen[/purple].
[sine]“We meet once more... it's me, Ranwid!”[/sine]

You do not know this man.

options.title: Give Potion
options.requires: You don't have any Potions that can be given.

options.title: Give Relic
options.requires: You don't have any Relics that can be given.

notes: The [gold]Give Potion[/gold] and [gold]Give Relic[/gold] option titles dynamically display the name of a specific randomly-chosen item from your inventory. For the relic trade, only [blue]tradable[/blue] relics are eligible to give. During the event, potions cannot be manually discarded. All three options award a relic drawn from the front of the relic reward pool. Giving a [gold]Relic[/gold] trades [blue]1[/blue] tradable relic for [blue]2[/blue] new relics.
